flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Widener University rose 21% between 2006 and 2009 ($26.4k → $31.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Widener University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.7k → $55.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Widener University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Widener University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (54.7% → 60.8%).
